description_long: This is a robust wooden chaise with a simple, utilitarian design, likely intended for public or communal urban spaces such as parks or transit stations. The seat and backrest are constructed from flat, thick wooden panels, with the backrest rising to a moderate height and featuring a subtle curve for ergonomic support. The sides of the chaise are solid and extend downward to form the legs, with a gentle outward flare at the base for stability. The rear panel is decorated with a pattern of rectangular insets, adding a touch of visual interest to the otherwise plain surface. The wood appears untreated or only lightly finished, giving the surface a matte, slightly rough texture. There are no visible cushions, upholstery, or decorative elements, emphasizing durability and ease of maintenance.
description: A sturdy, matte-finished wooden chaise with a curved backrest, solid side panels, and a patterned rear panel, designed for communal urban use. The design is simple and functional, with no visible cushions or upholstery.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, flat seat and the gently curved backrest, with solid side panels extending downward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the solid, thick side panel with a gentle outward curve at the base and the continuous backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the rectangular inset pattern on the back panel, with the full width and height of the chaise visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same solid panel construction and subtle curvature.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is moderately high, flat, and slightly curved for comfort, with no visible segmentation or decorative elements. It is constructed from a single wooden panel that extends the full width of the chaise.
attribute_armrest_presence: There are no distinct armrests; the side panels serve as the only lateral boundaries.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are integrated into the solid side panels, which extend downward and flare outward slightly at the base for stability. They are made of the same wood as the rest of the structure and lack decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: There is no visible upholstery; the surface is solid wood with a matte, slightly rough texture and no additional patterning.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are no cushions present; the seat and backrest are formed from continuous wooden panels with no attached or loose padding.
